overall.description: A nighttime walk through a rain-soaked urban street in GTA V. The camera moves past a bus stop and corner convenience store while heavy rain creates reflective puddles on the asphalt, with a white SUV passing by midway through the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban intersection with bus stop shelter

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk in heavy rain near a bus stop shelter

entered.detail: modern blue building with illuminated windows across the intersection
covered bus stop with illuminated advertisement panel on the right side
rain-soaked road surface with reflective puddles and street light reflections
tall street lights casting yellow-orange light through the rain

segments.scene_description: The clip opens on a rainy night at an urban intersection. A distinctive blue commercial building stands across the wet street while the camera moves past a bus stop shelter on the right. Heavy rain creates reflective puddles on the asphalt under artificial street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: corner convenience store with green awning

events.description: pedestrians become visible standing outside the convenience store entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the corner convenience store with green awning and illuminated signage

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians gathered outside the store entrance under the awning

entered.detail: two-story corner building with green awning and 24-7 signage
line of dark trees along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Moving past the bus stop, the camera approaches a corner convenience store with a green awning. Several pedestrians stand outside the store entrance seeking shelter from the rain. The blue building and bus stop recede behind as the camera turns slightly left toward the intersection.

events.description: white SUV drives past from left to right across the intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past the corner as a vehicle passes through the intersection

notable_agents.action: white SUV driving through the wet intersection from left to right

entered.detail: street continuing downhill with distant traffic lights and building lights
row of commercial and residential buildings lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: At the corner, a white SUV passes through the intersection from left to right. The camera continues down the wet street, leaving the convenience store behind. The street slopes downhill ahead, flanked by urban buildings on both sides under the persistent night rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban intersection that gradually transitions into a downhill street view. It begins by gliding past a bus stop shelter on the right, with a distinctive blue commercial building visible across the wet asphalt and reflective puddles shimmering under artificial street lighting. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts toward a corner convenience store with a green awning where pedestrians huddle for shelter, causing the blue building to recede into the background. The camera then turns slightly left at the intersection just as a white SUV passes through the frame from left to right. Finally, the view expands as the camera leaves the store behind and continues down a sloping street flanked by urban buildings under the persistent night rain.
